title: case_type_result.json -- case-type classification v0.1
description: Produced by claim-analysis's checkpoint 3 (Case Type Classification). Determines template_id for the report template downstream -- a mandatory, independently schema-validated gate, see claim-analysis.md.

secondary_case_types.description: Additional case types that also genuinely apply to this claim (e.g. a claim that is both a surgery-cost case and a permanent-disability case), beyond the primary. Empty array if the claim is a single, clean case type.

candidate_types.description: Alternative case types considered and their confidence, descending. First entry should match case_type. Recorded for audit even though evaluation.md only ever compares Top-1 against ground truth.

template_id.description: Report template identifier. One of 배상책임_후유장해형, 진단수술비형 (실손형/기타형 still TODO, no ground-truth basis yet) -- see templates/draft-report.md for the full section structure per template_id (see open-decisions.md #2 for status). document-assembly does not yet enforce section presence/order against this value -- that wrapper is still a follow-up.

case_type.description: Kept in Korean -- matches pipeline.md's case-type taxonomy, the real-world classification vocabulary that determines report template selection.
